name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES state, flag, turn


  od
*)
Init == 
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> idle]
  /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
  /\ turn = 1

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = idle
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = trying]
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ turn' = i
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = trying
    /\ flag[turn] /\ turn /= i
    /\ state' = state
    /\ flag' = flag
    /\ turn' = turn
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = trying
    /\ ~flag[turn] \/ turn = i
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = critical]
    /\ flag' = flag
    /\ turn' = turn
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = critical
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = idle]
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES coordinator, participants, messages, state

Prepare = [msg |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator, to |-> participants]
VoteYes = [msg |-> "VoteYes", from |-> participants, to |-> coordinator]
VoteNo = [msg |-> "VoteNo", from |-> participants, to |-> coordinator]
Commit = [msg |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator, to |-> participants]
Abort = [msg |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator, to |-> participants]

Init == /\ coordinator = 0
        /\ participants = 1..N
        /\ messages = {}
        /\ state = [i \in 0..N |-> "Init"]

PreparePhase == /\ messages' = messages \cup {Prepare}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "PreparePhase"]

VotePhase == /\ messages' = messages \cup {VoteYes}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "VotePhase"]

CommitPhase == /\ messages' = messages \cup {Commit}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "CommitPhase"]

AbortPhase == /\ messages' = messages \cup {Abort}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "AbortPhase"]

Next == \/ PreparePhase
        \/ VotePhase
        \/ CommitPhase
        \/ AbortPhase

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinator, participants, messages, state>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented by a set of indices 1..N. *)
Forks == 1..N

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating". *)
State == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, all forks are free. *)
Init == /\ forks = Forks
        /\ state = [i \in Forks |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper predicates to determine left and right fork indices. *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Predicate to check if a philosopher can eat (both forks are free). *)
CanEat(i) == forks = Forks
            /\ state[i] = "hungry"

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating. *)
TakeForks(i) == /\ forks' = {}
                 /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks and starts thinking. *)
PutForks(i) == /\ forks' = Forks
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry. *)
BecomeHungry(i) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

(* Next-state relation: a philosopher can either become hungry, start eating, or finish eating. *)
Next == \/ \E i \in Forks:
          /\ CanEat(i)
          /\ TakeForks(i)
        \/ \E i \in Forks:
          /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ BecomeHungry(i)
        \/ \E i \in Forks:
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ PutForks(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

(* Type invariant: forks is a subset of Forks, state maps each fork to a valid state. *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \subseteq Forks
          /\ state \in [Forks -> State]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Next == \/ /\ size < K
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
           /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ head' = head
       \/ /\ size > 0
           /\ q' = q
           /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>> /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        \/ /\ state' = state
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = %(token, N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_token

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, FiniteMaps, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

Next == /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ k \in Keys
        /\ v \in Values

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

CONSTANT N, M, V, NULL

TypeOK == acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\
          proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\
          chosen \in V

Init == acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]] /\
        proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]] /\
        chosen = NULL

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
              /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i].ballot = proposers[p].ballot']

Promise(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = acceptors[p].ballot
              /\ proposers[p].value' = acceptors[p].value

Accept(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
            /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i].value = proposers[p].value]

Chosen(v) == /\ chosen' = v
            /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i].value = v]

Next == \/ /\ \E p \in 1..M: /\ proposers[p].value # NULL
                 /\ proposers[p].ballot = acceptors[p].ballot
                 /\ Prepare(p)
            \/ /\ \E p \in 1..M: /\ proposers[p].value # NULL
                 /\ proposers[p].ballot = acceptors[p].ballot
                 /\ Promise(p)
            \/ /\ \E p \in 1..M: /\ proposers[p].value # NULL
                 /\ proposers[p].ballot = acceptors[p].ballot
                 /\ Accept(p)
            \/ /\ \E v \in V: /\ chosen = NULL
                 /\ \A i \in 1..N: acceptors[i].value = v
                 /\ Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retries, sentChunks, seqNum, state, timer

Init ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ seqNum = 0
    /\ retries = 0
    /\ timer = 0
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ seqNum < Len(File) \div ChunkSize
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {seqNum}
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum + 1
    /\ retries' = 0
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ UNCHANGED << ackedChunks >>

WaitAck ==
    /\ state = "sending"
    /\ state' = "waiting"
    /\ UNCHANGED << seqNum, retries, timer, sentChunks, ackedChunks >>

AckChunk ==
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {seqNum}
    /\ state' = "idle"
    /\ UNCHANGED << seqNum, retries, timer, sentChunks >>

Retransmit ==
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ retries < MaxRetries
    /\ state' = "sending"
    /\ retries' = retries + 1
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ UNCHANGED << seqNum, sentChunks, ackedChunks >>

GiveUp ==
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ retries = MaxRetries
    /\ state' = "failed"
    /\ UNCHANGED << seqNum, retries, timer, sentChunks, ackedChunks >>

TimeoutTick ==
    /\ state = "waiting"
    /\ timer > 0
    /\ timer' = timer - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED << state, seqNum, retries, sentChunks, ackedChunks >>

Done ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ seqNum = Len(File) \div ChunkSize
    /\ state' = "done"
    /\ UNCHANGED << retries, timer, sentChunks, ackedChunks >>

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ WaitAck
    \/ AckChunk
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp
    \/ TimeoutTick
    \/ Done

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<< state, seqNum, retries, timer, sentChunks, ackedChunks >>

====
